calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Christopher Roussel.

Ms. Hinshaw explained the extent of services provided to support the request for Attorney's fees and the extraordinary fees for the Co-Executors. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or A Further Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Christopher Roussel.

Ms. Eisenberg stated that the petition was filed this morning and that the hearing date was set for May 25, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11218. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution Or A Further Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Mar-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Christopher Roussel and Corinne Marcotte (Executors).

Ms. Eisenberg requested a 60 day continunace stating that they were in the process of completing and finalizing the Petition for Final Distribution and that they were waiting for the tax certification. The matter was continued to March 29, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.
